song.title: Therefore the Redeemed
song.lyrics: [V1] 1) Therefore the redeemed Of the Lord shall return, And come with singing unto Zion; And everlasting joy Shall be upon their head.|| Therefore the redeemed Of the Lord shall return, And come with singing unto Zion; And everlasting joy Shall be upon their head.|| They shall obtain gladness and joy; And sorrow and mourning Shall flee away.
song.author: Isaiah 51:11, Ruth Lake-Ferguson
